name: SAC: Disaggregated KV Cache System for Sparse Attention LLMs with CXL
content: The scaling of LLMs toward long-context inference has shifted the primary serving system bottleneck from computation to memory capacity. Traditional solutions for dense attention models rely on RDMA-based disaggregated memory pools, which perform coarse-grained fetching of the entire prefix KV cache from remote storage to local memory before decoding. However, this approach is fundamentally inefficient for emerging sparse attention models. While only a small fraction of KV entries are active dur
summary: 为了应对新兴稀疏注意力模型，我们提出了一种新的SAC（Sparse Attention Cache）系统，利用CXL的低延迟和缓存行粒度加载/存储特性，在推理过程中仅获取所需的前K个键值对，从而显著提高了性能。
key_insights: SAC是首个为稀疏注意力模型优化的高效去耦合键值缓存系统。
通过使用CXL低延迟和缓存行粒度特性，SAC在推理过程中仅获取所需的前K个键值对，从而减少了传输瓶颈和本地内存浪费。
与基于RDMA的传统方法相比，SAC实现了2.1倍的吞吐量提升、9.7倍的时间到首次反馈减少以及1.8倍的总时间减少。
xihe_relevance: SAC系统的高效性能可能对曦和项目具有潜在价值。
